meaning: n.华而不实的东西,姜饼adj.华而不实的
examples: The carriage was lined inside with sugar-plums, and in the seats were fruits and gingerbread.
As with gingerbread men and gummy bears, the dilemma when served a locust is whether to begin eating it head or legs first.
Then Gingerbread Man met a pig.
Two years later he made his first West End appearance in Gilt And Gingerbread.
But until now, we'd never had quality hands-on time with the 3.7-inch Gingerbread device.
